summary: Sweet, good‑quality recording of a brilliant show highlighted by an Ornette Coleman guest jam on “Garcia with Ornette” (3 Wishes).
review: The crowd‑recorded tape captures a magical second set where Ornette (or his son Denardo) joins the Dead, turning the music into something other‑worldly. Reviewers rave about the performance and note the recording is clear and pleasant, making this a must‑listen for fans of that unique collaboration.

ai_rating.rationale: Five reviews (three 5‑star, two neutral/low) consistently praise both the musical performance and the recording quality, with no significant criticism.

recording_quality.technical_notes: Reviewers call it a "sweet" and "good" recording; no drop‑outs or balance issues are mentioned.

show_quality.setlist_flow: Second set is the highlight, featuring an inspired jam with Ornette Coleman (or Denardo) that lifts the entire concert to a higher level.

band_member_comments.Jerry: Praised for his interplay with Ornette on the added track; highlighted as a high point of the night.
